content.claim: A 2023 law extended uniform state employment terms across all provider types (state, church, private, foundation), making teachers and institutions subject to a unified legal status regime and strengthening school district centres' employer and maintenance powers.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Legal and governance lens
limitations: The characterization of this reform as 'centralizing control' or 'making institutions vulnerable' comes from advocacy-sourced critiques (Heinrich Böll Stiftung, trade unions); no neutral government assessment quantifying employer-discretion changes is cited.
The direct relevance to gymnázium structure (as opposed to overall employment governance) is logical but not explicitly stated in the source material.
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
